advantages.title: Quick Start
advantages.description: Describe your business — AI creates a complete website in 5 minutes without a designer or programmer.

advantages.title: Online Sales and Requests
advantages.description: Accept orders and requests directly from the site — increase revenue without additional costs.

advantages.title: Affordable Cost
advantages.description: Start for free. Paid plans are accessible to small businesses without major investment.

advantages.title: Online Visibility
advantages.description: SEO optimization helps customers find your business in search for relevant queries.

advantages.title: Professional Appearance
advantages.description: Modern design builds trust in the business and increases visitor conversion.

advantages.title: Works 24/7
advantages.description: The site accepts requests and orders around the clock, even when you're not at your computer.

how_it_works.title: Tell About Your Business
how_it_works.description: What are you selling or offering — AI will create suitable structure and copy.

how_it_works.title: Customize Content
how_it_works.description: Add products or services, contacts, and request forms through a simple editor.

how_it_works.title: Launch and Grow
how_it_works.description: Publish the site and expand it as your business grows.

faq.question: Is Promto suitable for self-employed and sole proprietors?
faq.answer: Yes, Promto works great for any business size — from self-employed to small companies.

faq.question: How will the site help increase sales?
faq.answer: Attracts customers from search, accepts requests 24/7, and creates a professional impression.

faq.question: Do I need a programmer for site maintenance?
faq.answer: No. Update content yourself through the editor — it takes minutes.

faq.question: Can I start with a simple page and expand later?
faq.answer: Yes, start with one page and add sections and features as your business grows.

faq.question: How much does a small business website cost?
faq.answer: Basic website is free. Advanced features on affordable paid plans starting from a small monthly amount.

faq.question: What is Promto and how does it create websites?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. You describe your business in words, and AI generates a ready website with design and copy.

cta_mid_subtitle: A website for your business is the best investment in your company's growth.
cta_final_title: Your Business Deserves a Good Website
